description: Raw TCP-interface bytes from RNS 1.3.8, recorded by a socket that speaks nothing. tcp_stream.bin is the wire stream including framing; tcp_frame_announce.bin is one de-framed packet from it.

framing.how: De-framed the recorded stream and handed the result back to RNS.Identity.validate_announce, which accepted it. The escape rules were then confirmed by announcing app_data containing both 0x7E and 0x7D and reading the escaping off the wire.
